name: Ass Beeter! (pistol)
description: A Bandit-bodied pistol fitted with a Jakobs barrel. It hits harder and shoots straighter, but the slower fire rate and kick make rapid follow-up shots less forgiving. Best used for deliberate headshots, with the larger Bandit magazine helping it stay efficient between reloads.
notes: Spawns at green rarity or above and is most commonly found as a world drop.
